# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.

Prevent edge computing security.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { VercelRequest, VercelResponse } from '@vercel/node';

export default async function handler(req: VercelRequest, res: VercelResponse) {
  if (req.method !== 'POST') {
    res.status(405).send('Method Not Allowed');
    return;
  }

  try {
    const { content, headers } = req.body;

    if (typeof content !== 'string' || typeof headers !== 'object') {
      res.status(400).send('Invalid input');
      return;
    }

    const stream = new ReadableStream({
      start(controller) {
        controller.enqueue(content);
        controller.close();
      }
    });

    const responseHeaders = new Headers();
    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(headers)) {
      responseHeaders.append(key, value);
    }

    const response = new Response(stream, {
      headers: responseHeaders
    });

    res.status(response.status);
    response.headers.forEach((value, key) => {
      res.setHeader(key, value);
    });

    const reader = response.body?.getReader();
    if (reader) {
      const pump = () => reader.read().then(({ done, value }) => {
        if (done) {
          res.end();
          return;
        }
        res.write(value);
        pump();
      });
      pump();
    }
  } catch (error) {
    res.status(500).send('Internal Server Error');
  }
}
